data.body:
I’M NOT SLEEPY
GARDEN OUTSIDE THE 
AMBASSADOR’S APARTMENT ON DAGON
It was after midnight. The lights along the path were comfortable, not too bright. The night air was chilly. Galen and the Ambassador walked slowly through the garden.

“The sky is clear tonight” the Ambassador said. 

3/14
data.author: did:plc:fkvdf5xwcvc6wes4wdunucmc

data.body:
“I have so missed you,” the Ambassador said. She looked up at him with tears in her eyes. 
“Me too. Maybe we should have?” Galen asked. He smiled sadly.
“That was never who we were destined to be. We always wanted different things,” the Ambassador said. 

8/14
data.author: did:plc:fkvdf5xwcvc6wes4wdunucmc

data.body:
The Ambassador looked up. “Yes. Yes, it is,” she said. 
“Good night, Micha,” Galen said.
The Ambassador reached for his shoulders. “See you in the morning,” she said.

13/14
